title: Redirect Revalidation, DNS, Address Classes, Proxies, and SSRF
description: A URL passes string validation once, then redirects or resolves to loopback, private, link-local, metadata, mixed-address, or rebinding targets through an ambient proxy. Learners cumulatively produce connection-time SSRF defense record through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Allowlist schemes and ports, reject embedded credentials, and prohibit non-HTTP destinations before resolution.
Classify all IPv4 and IPv6 answers including mapped, loopback, private, link-local, multicast, unspecified, and metadata ranges.
Resolve every Location and reapply authorization, scope, credential, method, DNS, loop, and budget rules per hop.
